meta.title: Jonathan Brownstein — Revenue & Accounting Data Analyst
meta.description: Revenue and accounting analytics specialist with fifteen years connecting financial data, reporting accuracy, and stakeholder decisions in regulated healthcare-adjacent and enterprise finance environments. I reconcile re

hero.description: Revenue and accounting analytics specialist with fifteen years connecting financial data, reporting accuracy, and stakeholder decisions in regulated healthcare-adjacent and enterprise finance environments. I reconcile revenue extracts across periods, write SQL on large operational datasets, and build Tableau and Power BI dashboards for variance and trend reporting. Contract work spans extract comparison frameworks, GAAP-aligned validation, advanced Excel and Power Query, and workflow automation comparable to Alteryx-style prep. Six years in FP&A and controllership strengthened month-end reconciliation and executive financial reporting. Available immediately for remote temporary contract work on Mountain Time hours from northern Illinois.

highlights.label: Revenue reporting and analysis, accounting reconciliations, healthcare revenue cycle adjacent reporting, billing and collections performance analysis, financial data validation, GAAP-based financial analysis, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, advanced Microsoft Excel, Power Query, workflow automation, variance and trend analysis, stakeholder communication, Microsoft Dynamics 365 adjacent ERP reporting

experience.title: Delivery Record
experience.intro: Contract consulting work. Client names withheld under standard NDAs.

items.title: Senior Revenue and Financial Reporting Analyst
items.organization: Life and health financial services enterprise, remote hybrid contract, Chief Data Office ecosystem
bullets: Examined financial and revenue reporting extracts to validate accuracy, reconcile movement across periods and source systems, and document logic for audit-ready review.
Wrote SQL to retrieve, join, and analyze large premium, claims, and valuation datasets; built Tableau, Power BI, and SSRS dashboards for revenue and KPI reporting.
Designed a valuation extract comparison framework for period-over-period revenue movement analysis that replaced ad hoc reconciliations.

items.title: FP&A and Accounting Analytics Consultant
items.organization: Global manufacturing group, regional finance leadership
bullets: Supported planning, forecasting, budgeting, and month-end P&L variance analysis for finance, sales, operations, and regional leadership.
Prepared and reconciled financial information using advanced Excel, Power Query, and VBA automation across recurring KPI packages.
Partnered with finance and operational stakeholders to explain findings and package executive-ready commentary.

items.title: Contract Financial Reporting Validation Analyst
items.organization: Commercial banking and public sector financial systems, part time contract
bullets: Validated SQL reporting outputs against source extracts, executed reconciliation checks, and documented variances and sign off evidence in regulated environments.

groups.title: Revenue and accounting
items: revenue reporting, reconciliations, billing and collections analysis, healthcare revenue cycle familiarity, GAAP-based analysis, extract validation

groups.title: Tools
items: SQL, Tableau, Power BI, SSRS, Excel, Power Query, Python, VBA, Databricks

groups.title: Automation and systems
items: workflow automation (Python, Power Query, Alteryx-comparable), ERP reporting familiarity (Dynamics-style GL workflows)
